Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 25 

MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Authorized Eligibility Group Population Code 

DESCRIPTION: The eligibility group(s) the state is authorized to enroll in managed care plans by its operating 
authority 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD 

LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APL Population Enrolled 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual
